subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth, wherein is that which draweth the peoples of the world nigh unto a hallowed and wondrous Paradise, should they remain steadfast in love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق و فیه ما یقرب العالمین الی رضوان قدس بدیع ان یستقیمن علی حب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Word of God and human limitations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer
